notes: v3.4.0: new authenticity-guard agent plus accuracy fixes. Authenticity-guard cross-checks the generated resume and cover letter against your real background, flags any number or claim it cannot find in your source (anti-fabrication), flags AI-ish cliches with plain-English rewrites, and (with an AI key) rewrites the summary and bullets in a human voice. Also: ATS matching now understands word variants (manage/managed/management, customer/customers) for more accurate coverage; the resume summary now uses polished skill phrases; and the ATS Match tab runs a formatting check on your source resume (tables, columns, decorative bullets, missing standard headings) that real ATS can mis-read.
